[2018-05-18 23:58] unearthly: For Ranked Play, I don't quite understand the "Contribute Bonus cards". If I don't select it, does it change the number of random units?

[2018-05-18 23:59] ruinedshadows: @Unearthly yes it can
[2018-05-18 23:59] ruinedshadows: in base + 8 bonus units are randomly selected
[2018-05-18 23:59] crash_overlord: Basically, ranked is base +8. At the start of each game it shuffles like 6 blank tokens. It selects 3 at random. If any of the 3 are not blank it adds an aditional unit to the advanced set.
[2018-05-18 23:59] ruinedshadows: so it's really base + 8-11
